MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF COLE, SHANA C COURT TRIAL SET FOR JUN-17-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

DEPT.#1, JUDGE HERBERT DONALDSON. C/C FOR CT. TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIP. JUDGMENT FOR PL W/REST. OF PREMISES AT 270 10TH AVE, #1. DEF. TO PAY $2,434 R&D. SEE FILE FOR DETAILS.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON, JAMES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 270 10TH AVE, APT.#1, S.F, CA. $2,434.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,434.00, STAYED UNTIL JUL-07-1993, $300 SEC DEP RETAINED BY PL. & CREDITED TOWARD R&D. PL. WIL VACATE JUDGMENT & ENTER DISM AS LONG AS DEF. UPHOLDS STIP. SEE FILE FOR COMPLETE DETAILS.
